tiktok.caption: Paying off your mortgage early could cost you $1,000,000. Here's the math nobody shows you.

youtube_short.title: Paying Off Your Mortgage Early = $1M Mistake
title_alternatives: Why Mortgage Payoff Is the Worst Financial Move
youtube_short.description: Your mortgage might be the cheapest debt you'll ever have — so why are you rushing to pay it off? The S&P 500 averages 10% a year while your mortgage costs around 7%. That 3% gap on just $500 a month compounds into over a million dollars over 30 years. There are only two valid reasons to pay early: your rate is above 8%, or debt genuinely keeps you up at night. Otherwise, invest the difference and let compounding do the heavy lifting. #mortgage #personalfinance #investing #moneytips Follow for more money math every day.

hook_line: Paying off your mortgage early = $1M mistake
